steps.t: Mayor Malmadog invited you to place the banners around Clegur in his stead. You should pick up the stack of banners near the fence in front of the may…
Mayor Malmadog invited you to place the banners around Clegur in his stead. You should place the banners in various locations around the village.
You have placed the Daffodil Days banners around the village of Clegur. You should return to Mayor Malmadog and let him know the job is done.
